title: Bean Bag Filling Refill Booster Polystyrene Extra Beads Top Up Bag Beans Balls Various Sizes (1 Cubic Feet)
features: Made from the highest Quality Premium Grade A Virgins polystyrene beads, white, small and round bead filling ideal for bean bag refills, wall cavity insulation or crafting filler.
Our Beanbag Filling is the highest quality long lasting premium grade available and is manufactured right here in the UK
Give your beanbag a new lease of life with a quality bean bag filling
Fire Retardant Fully compliant to British Standard BS5852 Fire & Furniture Regulations 1988
description: Polystyrene Balls Ideal For Bean Bags DIRECT FROM THE FACTORY Fire Retardant, High Quality Virgin Beans - UK manufactured Grade A Quality Ideal for adding that extra bounce to your bean bag!! Also can be used for pet beds, Projects, Wall Cavity and many other purposes. TECHNICAL SPECS: Expanded Polystyrene (EPS) fire retardant bead for the filling / refilling of bean bags. The bead has been tested and passes the Schedule 2 Part 1 of the Furniture and Furnishings (Fire) (Safety) Regulations 1988 (amended 1989, 1993 and 2010) using test based on BS5852:Part 2:1982. The Fire Retardant Additive (FRA) is to the latest specification Polymated FRA conforming to EU requirements. Bean Bag Refill Bead size 2 - 8 mm diameter Excellent Quality and Long Lasting
